name: alone-again
prompt: Wide shot. Dark-haired man standing alone in room. Couch center, table with datapad, books on desk, jacket on chair. Window showing night sky. Cool blue-white lighting. Empty, hollow space. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: picking-up-datapad
prompt: Close-up on hand picking up dark rectangular datapad from table. Face-down device being lifted. Cool blue light. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: reading
prompt: Medium close-up. Dark-haired man holding datapad, reading screen. Face illuminated by device glow. Expression neutral, processing. Dark room around him. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: setting-down
prompt: Close-up on datapad being set back on table. Dark device against surface. Cool blue lighting. Decision made. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: datapad set down on table surface, quiet finality
